message:
fix(agents): prevent data loss when agent file is unreadable

When an AGENTS.md file exists but can't be read (permissions, encoding
error), the detection previously returned empty content. Downstream
agents_add() could then overwrite the unreadable file with just a blurb,
losing the original content.

Now:
- Log a warning when file read fails
- Set read_error=true on the detection
- agents_add/update/remove all check read_error and return a clear
  error message instead of proceeding with empty content

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
